section.heading: Definitions

content.p: The term “agent” means an officer or employee of a covered institution or an institution-affiliated organization.
The term “covered institution” means any institution of higher education, as such term is defined in section 1002 of this title, that receives any Federal funding or assistance.

paragraph.heading: Education loan
paragraph.chapeau: The term “education loan” (except when used as part of the term “private education loan”) means—

subparagraph.content: any loan made, insured, or guaranteed under part B of subchapter IV;
any loan made under part D of subchapter IV; or

content.p: The term “eligible lender” has the meaning given such term in section 1085(d) of this title.

clause.content: is directly or indirectly related to a covered institution; and
is engaged in the practice of recommending, promoting, or endorsing education loans for students attending such covered institution or the families of such students;

subparagraph.content: may include an alumni organization, athletic organization, foundation, or social, academic, or professional organization, of a covered institution; and
notwithstanding subparagraphs (A) and (B), does not include any lender with respect to any education loan secured, made, or extended by such lender.

paragraph.heading: Lender
paragraph.chapeau: The term “lender” (except when used as part of the terms “eligible lender” and “private educational lender”)—

clause.content: in the case of a loan made, insured, or guaranteed under part B of subchapter IV, an eligible lender;
in the case of any loan issued or provided to a student under part D of subchapter IV, the Secretary; and
in the case of a private education loan, a private educational lender as defined in section 1650 of title 15; and

subparagraph.content: includes any other person engaged in the business of securing, making, or extending education loans on behalf of the lender.

content.p: The term “officer” includes a director or trustee of a covered institution or institution-affiliated organization, if such individual is treated as an employee of such covered institution or institution-affiliated organization, respectively.

subparagraph.chapeau: means an arrangement or agreement between a lender and a covered institution or an institution-affiliated organization of such covered institution—

clause.content: under which a lender provides or otherwise issues education loans to the students attending such covered institution or the families of such students; and
that relates to such covered institution or such institution-affiliated organization recommending, promoting, or endorsing the education loan products of the lender; and
arrangements or agreements with respect to loans under part D of subchapter IV; or
arrangements or agreements with respect to loans that originate through the auction pilot program under section 1099d(b) of this title.

content.p: The term “private education loan” has the meaning given the term in section 1650 of title 15.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title I, § 151, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title I, § 120, Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3117.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 1019, Pub. L. 89–329, title I, § 119, as added Pub. L. 96–374, title I, § 101(a), Oct. 3, 1980, 94 Stat. 1383, authorized appropriations for education outreach programs, prior to the general amendment of this subchapter by Pub. L. 99–498.
